title: Information for industry, embassies and consulates :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Information for industry, embassies and consulates
We work with airline carriers, panel physicians and the tourism industry. See our information for these industries below. Embassies and consulates can use our Visa Verification Service to check the status of someone's visa.
- Partnering with industry Immigration New Zealand (INZ) partners with industry groups, education providers, employers and businesses to make it easier for people to come to New Zealand.

## Partnering with industry
Immigration New Zealand (INZ) partners with industry groups, education providers, employers and businesses to make it easier for people to come to New Zealand.
- Embassies and consulates can use our Visa Verification service Embassies and consulates can register as a user of the Visa Verification Service to check a person’s visa status.

## Embassies and consulates can use our Visa Verification service
Embassies and consulates can register as a user of the Visa Verification Service to check a person’s visa status.
- Information for airline carriers Find information about airline carriers' responsibilities, immigration control areas, and New Zealand electronic travel authority (NZeTA) training material for airline staff.

## Information for airline carriers
Find information about airline carriers' responsibilities, immigration control areas, and New Zealand electronic travel authority (NZeTA) training material for airline staff.
- Information for panel physicians This section gives information for the panel physician network — doctors around the world who can complete medical examinations for visa applicants.

## Information for panel physicians
This section gives information for the panel physician network — doctors around the world who can complete medical examinations for visa applicants.
- Information for the tourism industry We partner with and support the tourism industry to streamline visa application processes and implement the New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA).

## Information for the tourism industry
We partner with and support the tourism industry to streamline visa application processes and implement the New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA).
